title: Murmur Studio
description: A free, open-source native macOS viewer for PhysioNet WFDB recordings. Renders ECG and multi-rate telemetry on a Metal-backed paper canvas alongside upstream-produced findings, with analyst disposition workflows. Optional paid extensions on the App Store add annotation authoring, standard ECG analytic measures (HRV, RR-interval statistics, intervals), and VT/VF detection (research use only).
